description: Anomalies in power management that require axiom modification or discovery

anomalies.name: PGOOD timeout during sequencing
anomalies.description: Rail fails to assert PGOOD within settle_ms window

anomalies.name: RT engagement without guardrail check
anomalies.description: Ride-through triggered but Vcap below safe threshold

anomalies.name: AI gate skipping without evidence
anomalies.description: AI executor skipped but no AI_SKIP evidence emitted

anomalies.name: Evidence sequence number discontinuity
anomalies.description: Evidence log seq jumps: seq_n < seq_{n-1}, breaking monotonicity guarantee

anomalies.name: Source lockout persists after clear command
anomalies.description: PMC_SRC_CMD lockout clear issued but SRC_STATE remains LOCKOUT
